# AudioHardwareUnload() | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Audio ](/documentation/coreaudio)

- [ AudioHardwareUnload() ](/documentation/coreaudio/audiohardwareunload())

-  AudioHardwareUnload() 

Function# AudioHardwareUnload()

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.1+

```
func AudioHardwareUnload() -> OSStatus
```

## [Return Value](/documentation/coreaudio/audiohardwareunload()#return-value)

An OSStatus indicating success or failure.

## [Discussion](/documentation/coreaudio/audiohardwareunload()#discussion)

When this routine is called, all IO on all devices within a process will be terminated and all resources capable of being released will be released. This routine essentially returns the HAL to its uninitialized state.
